name: EdwEdwIncomeDeleteErnIncmInvcLoad

text.value: DELETE c FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.ERN_INCM_F c JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.W_ERN_INCM_DRVR d ON c.SRC_SYS_CD = d.SRC_SYS_CD AND c.BILL_INVC_ID = d.BILL_INVC_ID AND c.ERN_INCM_TYP_CD = d.ERN_INCM_TYP_CD WHERE c.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK <> @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle}

Annotations:
Delete the ERN_INCM_F  table.
JobName:
EdwEdwIncomeDeleteErnIncmInvc

Delete Old Billing INvoice data
Data is extracted from the ERN_INCM_F Table
buffer
Deletes Billing Invoice Records processed thru the allocation process this job that may have already been loaded in last months process.

Sometimes new natural keys are built and therefore need to delete the old records so the billing invoice will balance back to IDS, and back to Facets.
